title: paspalum subciliatum
intro: Paspalum subciliatum, also known as Dwarf Paspalum, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Paspalum subciliatum include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Paspalum subciliatum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to address various health concerns.
